overview: MATERNEUM ELECTRONIC GYNECOLOGY COUCH Three motors Electrical backrest, height, and Trendelenburg/Reverse Trendelenburg adjustments Electric adjustment system with remote control Three sectional ergonomic design Consist of back section, pelvis and thighs section Electrostatic powder-coated metal frame Anti-microbial, waterproof, flame-retardant, and easy-to-clean upholstery Stainless steel accessory rails Stainless steel fold-down side rails with patient handles Easy removable stainless steel fluid basin Paper roll support Adjustable and lockable polyurethane leg supports with straps 4 castors with retractable rolling system brakes fixing floor on 4 rubber caps Backrest with gas spring (optional) Hydraulic height adjustment (optional) Grip handles (optional) Footrest (optional) Rechargeable battery backup system (optional) Foot switch (optional) Two-motor version (optional)
